SEQUENCE.COMMENT: Invoke GetTransaction Notes service from ExLink

MAP.COMMENT: Map to Canonical + set hardcoded values
===== Do Nothing as we want to return all Notes for internal users =====

SEQUENCE.NAME: $default
SEQUENCE.COMMENT: External (Type=2) and any other User types

MAP.COMMENT: Initalize temp List of notes, variable
Get isInternal and convert it to all lower case

SEQUENCE.NAME: false
SEQUENCE.COMMENT: Add this Note to temp list

MAP.COMMENT: Get current note to a temp note variable
Initialize CommentListResponse, so the response wouldn't be empty
===== Call TransactionApplicants service to obtain Company info =====
Map Customer info from ApplicantResonse to CommentListResponse
On each Note, Transform date from yyyy-mm-ddThh:mm:ss to mm/dd/yyyy hh:mm
